questionHtml: Calculate the distance along the slope at which the sledge stops moving. Assume that the coefficient of dynamic friction is constant.
markschemeHtml:
correct use of kinematics equation

distance = 4.4 or 4.0 «m»

Alternative 2

KE lost=work done against friction + GPE

distance = 4.4 or 4.0 «m»

Allow ECF from (e)(i)

Allow [1 max] for GPE missing leading to 8.2 «m»

meta.title: Calculate the distance along the slope at which the sledge stops moving. Assume that the coefficient of dynamic friction is constant.
